title: The Agents of Nations Submission Receipt v0.1
description: Minimum target-system receipt required for an agent to move from payload_prepared to submitted_with_receipt.

status.description: Whether the target system received the submission request.

receipt_id.description: Receipt identifier generated by the target system. Agents must not self-generate this as completion proof.

task_id.description: The submitted task_id. It should exist in the public task feed.

received_at.description: ISO timestamp generated by the target system when the submission was received.

submission_status.description: Submission state assigned by the target system.

proof_origin.description: Where the proof came from. Only target_system or public_durable_record can count as completion proof.
